title: nothopanax fruticosus var. plumatus
intro: Nothopanax fruticosus var. plumatus, also known as the "Evergreen Clematis," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Araliaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Nothopanax fruticosus var. plumatus include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating respiratory and skin conditions. Nothopanax fruticosus var. plumatus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
